locator.quote: showed a catastrophic +£72/d → −£200/d swing between the first 7-day

text: Trigger: a catastrophic +£72/d → −£200/d swing between two adjacent 7-day held-out windows, six agents all the same direction — regime-fit to the original eval window, not noise.
A single contiguous eval window lets the GA memorise specific races over generations — one of five identified overfit sources in the GA setup.

locator.quote: The 14-day monitor reeval at fc=0 is the honest deployment number.

text: Monitor days are observe-only, disjoint from train/eval; the 14-day monitor reeval at fc=0 is the honest deployment number.
